stories.title: Hurricanes one win from lifting Cup: Grades, big q...
Near elimination, Vegas' Tortorella vows Game 7
stories.summary: Golden Knights coach John Tortorella vowed that the Stanley Cup Final would return to Raleigh for Game 7 after Carolina pushed his team to the brink of elimination.

stories.title: Dodgers' Ohtani exits early with knee inflammation...
stories.summary: Dodgers star Shohei Ohtani exited in the seventh inning of Thursday's win at Pittsburgh with knee inflammation, but manager Dave Roberts said the move was precautionary.

stories.title: Texas Tech defends integrity amid Sorsby backlash
stories.summary: In a 20-plus-minute video released, Texas Tech officials defended their integrity and reiterated their support for Brendan Sorsby amid widespread criticism from the rest of the Big 12 Conference and other corners of college sports.

stories.title: Hwang's magic sparks South Korea comeback win
stories.summary: Hwang In-beom has led South Korea to a 2-1 comeback win over the Czech Republic in the World Cup in a game played in front of hundreds of empty seats at Mexico's Guadalajara Stadium.
